Exploratory Data Analysis (EDA) Questions¶

Complete the following tasks using pandas, NumPy, and visualization libraries. Write your own code in the cells provided below. Do not include answers; only solve each question by writing code.

Setup¶

Import the required Python libraries for data analysis and visualization.

In [3]:
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns
import numpy as np

Load the Dataset¶

Load the provided CSV dataset into a pandas DataFrame and display the first five records to verify that it has been loaded correctly.

In [4]:
df = pd.read_csv(r"C:\Users\sharm\OneDrive\Documents\ai_workforce_displacement_global_2020_2026.csv")

Question 1: Dataset Overview¶

Perform an initial exploration of the dataset. Write code to determine:

  • Number of rows and columns
  • Data types of all columns
  • Summary statistics for numerical features
  • Number of unique values in each column
  • Missing values in each column
  • Duplicate records in the dataset.
In [6]:
df.shape
Out[6]:
(20800, 23)
In [7]:
df.dtypes
Out[7]:
record_id                                   int64
country                                    object
iso3_code                                  object
region                                     object
income_group                               object
year                                        int64
quarter                                     int64
quarter_label                              object
industry_sector                            object
sector_automation_risk_score              float64
gdp_per_capita_usd                          int64
ai_adoption_index                         float64
pct_sector_workforce_displaced            float64
pct_sector_workforce_new_roles_created    float64
net_workforce_change_pct                  float64
ai_cited_layoff_announcements               int64
ai_skill_wage_premium_pct                 float64
pct_workforce_female                      float64
pct_displaced_roles_female                float64
reskilling_programs_count                   int64
govt_ai_policy_score_1_to_10              float64
ai_tool_adoption_pct                      float64
data_source_notes                          object
dtype: object

Question 19¶

Create a new column called AI Readiness Score.
AI Readiness = AI Adoption + Policy Score

In [33]:
df['ai_readiness_score'] = df['ai_adoption_index']+df['govt_ai_policy_score_1_to_10']
df['ai_readiness_score']

Question 20¶

Display countries where workforce displacement exceeds new roles created.

In [34]:
df2 = df.groupby('country')['pct_sector_workforce_displaced'].mean().reset_index()
In [35]:
df3 = df.groupby('country')['pct_sector_workforce_new_roles_created'].mean().reset_index()
In [36]:
df4 = pd.merge(df2,df3,how='left',on = 'country')
In [37]:
df4[df4['pct_sector_workforce_displaced']>df4['pct_sector_workforce_new_roles_created']]

Distribution of AI Adoption Index

In [51]:
plt.figure(figsize=(8,6))
sns.histplot(df['ai_adoption_index'],color='seagreen',bins=20,edgecolor='white',kde=True)
plt.title("Distribution of AI Adoption Index",fontsize=14,fontweight='bold')
plt.xlabel("AI Adoption Index")
plt.ylabel("Count")

AI Adoption by Region

plt.title("AI Adoption by Region")
plt.xlabel("AI Adoption Region")

Question 28¶

AI Adoption Over Time

In [57]:
plt.figure(figsize=(10,6))

ai_year = df.groupby('year')['ai_adoption_index'].mean().reset_index()

sns.lineplot(
    data=ai_year,
    x='year',
    y='ai_adoption_index',
    marker='o',
    linewidth=3,
    color='crimson'
)


plt.title('Average AI Adoption Over Time', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', color='crimson')
plt.xlabel('Year', fontsize=12)
plt.ylabel('Average AI Adoption Index', fontsize=12)
plt.grid(alpha=0.3)
plt.show()

Question 29¶

Workforce Displacement Over Time

In [58]:
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))


workforce = df.groupby('year')['pct_sector_workforce_displaced'].mean().reset_index()


sns.lineplot(
    data=workforce,
    x='year',
    y='pct_sector_workforce_displaced',
    marker='o',
    linewidth=3,
    color='teal'
)


plt.title('Average Workforce Displacement Over Time', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
plt.xlabel('Year')
plt.ylabel('Workforce Displaced')


plt.grid(alpha=0.3)
plt.show()

Question 30¶

Correlation Heatmap

In [59]:
plt.figure(figsize=(12, 8))

 
corr = df.corr(numeric_only=True)


sns.heatmap(
    corr,
    annot=True,
    cmap='coolwarm',  
    linewidths=0.5,
    fmt='.2f'
)


plt.title('Correlation Heatmap', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
plt.show()

Question 31¶

GDP vs AI Adoption

In [60]:
plt.figure(figsize=(10,6))

sns.scatterplot(
    data=df,
    x='gdp_per_capita_usd',
    y='ai_adoption_index',
    hue='income_group',
    palette='Set2',
    s=80
)

plt.title('GDP Per Capita vs AI Adoption',fontsize=14,fontweight='bold')
plt.xlabel('GDP Per Capita')
plt.ylabel('AI Adoption Index')
plt.legend(title='income_group')
plt.grid(alpha=0.3)
plt.show()

Question 32¶

AI Adoption vs Workforce Displacement - Scatter Plot

In [61]:
plt.figure(figsize=(10, 6))

sns.scatterplot(
    data=df,
    x='ai_adoption_index',
    y='pct_sector_workforce_displaced',
    hue='region',
    palette='viridis',  
    s=70
)


plt.title('AI Adoption vs Workforce Displacement', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
plt.xlabel('AI Adoption Index')
plt.ylabel('Workforce Displaced')
plt.legend(title='Region')

plt.grid(alpha=0.3)
plt.show()

Question 33¶

Workforce Displacement by Industry - boxplot

In [64]:
plt.figure(figsize=(12,6))

sns.boxplot(
    data=df,
    x='industry_sector',
    y='pct_sector_workforce_displaced',
    hue='industry_sector',
    palette='viridis',
    legend=False
)

plt.title('Workforce Displacement by Industry', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
plt.xlabel('Industry')
plt.ylabel('Workforce Displaced')
plt.xticks(rotation=45)

plt.show()

Question 34¶

Automation Risk by Industry (Bar Chart)

In [65]:
plt.figure(figsize=(8,6))

risk = df.groupby('industry_sector')['sector_automation_risk_score'].mean().sort_values()

sns.barplot(
    data=risk.reset_index(),
    x='sector_automation_risk_score',
    y='industry_sector',
    hue='industry_sector',
    palette='coolwarm',
    legend=False
)

plt.title('Automation Risk by Industry', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold')
plt.xlabel('Sector Automation Risk Score')
plt.ylabel('Industry Sector')

plt.show()

Question 35¶

Top 10 Countries by AI Adoption

In [66]:
plt.figure(figsize=(12,6))

top10 = df.groupby('country')['ai_adoption_index'].mean().sort_values(ascending=False).head(10)

sns.barplot(
    data=top10.reset_index(),
    x='ai_adoption_index',
    y='country',
    hue='country',
    palette='viridis',
    legend=False
)

plt.title('Top 10 Countries by AI Adoption', fontsize=16, fontweight='bold')
plt.xlabel('Average AI Adoption Index')
plt.ylabel('Country')

plt.show()

Question 36¶

AI Wage Premium by Income Group

In [67]:
plt.figure(figsize=(8,6))

sns.barplot(
    data=df,
    x='income_group',
    y='ai_skill_wage_premium_pct',
    hue='income_group',
    palette='Set2',
    legend=False
)

plt.title('Average AI Wage Premium by Income Group',
          fontsize=14,
          fontweight='bold')

plt.xlabel('Income Group')
plt.ylabel('AI Wage Premium (%)')

plt.show()

Question 37¶

Female Workforce vs Female Displacement

In [68]:
plt.figure(figsize=(6,4))

sns.scatterplot(
    data=df,
    x='pct_workforce_female',
    y='pct_displaced_roles_female',
    color='teal',
    s=80
)

plt.grid(True)

plt.title(
    "Female Workforce vs Female Displacement",
    fontsize=14,
    fontweight='bold'
)

plt.xlabel('Female Workforce (%)')
plt.ylabel('Female Displaced Roles (%)')

plt.show()

    y='income_group',

    palette='viridis',
    legend=False
)

plt.title('AI Tool Adoption by Income Group',
